steps.title: Rewrite the system
steps.content:
Rewrite the first equation by moving the $x$ term to the left:
$$
6x+7y=2550
$$
Divide the second equation by $4$:
$$
6x-7y=450
$$

steps.title: Solve by elimination
steps.content:
Add the two equations to eliminate $y$:
$$
12x=3000
$$
$$
x=250
$$
Substitute into $6x+7y=2550$:
$$
1500+7y=2550
$$
$$
y=150
$$

steps.title: Add the coordinates
steps.content: The requested value is: $$ x+y=250+150=400 $$ The answer is 400.
